title: Moldys "The Forest"
description: This is a Mcreator mod based on the game "The Forest"
body:
I recently started playing The Forest with my friends and thought it would be a great idea to start working on a minecraft mod base upon it.
-Bone Armor introduced.
-Plane Axe added.
-Modern Axe added.

-Doors, Slabs, Stairs, Doors and Walls added (Forest Wood)
-Custom Campfire added. (Fully functional)

-Treesap added, currently useless.

-Cannibal Corpse added

-Better Tree generation

-Days counter (Only in the added Dimension)

-Cannibal Limbs. Right-click a cannibal corpse with an Axe from this mod to gain limbs or to get the whole body right-click with an empty hand (only works if the body has all limbs.)

-You can burn the corpse on a Fire source (Campfire included) and it will drop all limbs that it has, but cooked. Eat all types to get an Achievement. 

There will be more in the mod, but for now those are the only things in its Beta stage. The other Armor sets will be added. The Mutants will be added and the wildlife from the game. I think making a game like "The Forest" into a mod will be definitely a challenge, but it's going to be a nice way to see where I can get to in modding. To get to the Dimension you have to craft "The Forest Igniter" and make a portal out of Oak Logs.
